category_sources: source_facts.description calls it a DevOps management tool; official GitHub README describes Juju as an open source application orchestration engine for deployment, integration, and lifecycle management across infrastructure.
display_name_sources: Official Canonical homepage and GitHub README use Juju; source_facts.name is juju.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to documentation.ubuntu.com Juju docs; source_facts.homepage is Canonical's Juju product page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/juju/juju, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says DevOps management; official GitHub README documents deployment, integration, lifecycle management, Kubernetes or other infrastructure, and charms.
